title: business_days — inclusive weekday count
prompt: Write a Python function with this exact signature:
def business_days(start: str, end: str) -> int:
start and end are ISO dates in 'YYYY-MM-DD' form, with end >= start guaranteed.
Return the number of weekdays (Monday through Friday) in the inclusive date
range [start, end]. Do not consider public holidays. You may use only the Python
Respond with a SINGLE Python code block (```python ... ```) defining business_days
and nothing else. Include no explanation outside the code block.
difficulty_rationale: Date handling with an inclusive-range boundary and weekend exclusion. The full-month assert (July 2026 = 23 weekdays, verified) and the weekend-only assert punish off-by-one and half-open-range mistakes. Expected medium+ solid; low risks the inclusive boundary.
